preheader: This weekend in Celebration: a block party by the lake, free Friday concerts, the Sunday farmers market, sweet local deals, and good news — from Sunni. ☀️
forecast:
Well, good mornin', Celebration! Pour yourself something cold and pull up a chair — summer's showing off out there. Look for blue-sky mornings, highs right around 90°, and one of those classic afternoon pop-up storms that rolls through, waters the lawn, and clears out by supper. Pool before noon, porch after — that's the plan, hunni.

The 4th of July is just over a week out and the whole town's already buzzin'. I rounded up your weekend, three good reads, the deals worth your while, and a little good news to start things sunny. — Sunni

top_billing.title: Great American Block Party at Boxi Park
top_billing.when: Thursday–Sunday · Boxi Park, Lake Nona · Free
top_billing.body: If you do one thing this weekend, sugar, make it this. Boxi Park throws its big Great American Block Party all weekend long — live music, food trucks galore, cold drinks, and room for the kids (and the pups) to run. Roll in any evening, grab a bite, and stay for that Lake Nona sunset. I'll save you a picnic table.

storefront.title: A night out, the local way
storefront.body: Skip the drive to the parks tonight, hunni — the Town Center's got you. We rounded up where the locals actually go after dark: the dinner tables worth lingering at, the craft beer pouring cold, and the spots to land when you want one more before home. Date night, friends' night, or just-because — it's all a stroll away.

bright_spot.title: Happy 30th, Celebration!
bright_spot.body: Can you believe it — our little town turned 30 this month. From a Disney blueprint back in 1996 to the front-porch, lakefront community we know today, a whole lot has changed (and a lot of the good stuff hasn't). We looked back at how Celebration grew up — and what still makes it feel like home in 2026.

guide.label: The Almanac
guide.title: Your 4th of July in Celebration
guide.body: The complete, no-stress guide to Independence Day around town — where to catch the fireworks, the parade route, family-friendly cookouts, and the spots that book up fast. Save it, share it, plan around it.

giveaway.title: Win a $100 Market Street gift card
giveaway.body: Spend it however you like — dinner for two, a fresh bouquet, a new pair of shades. Enter in ten seconds and I'll draw one lucky neighbor at the end of the month. Pop back each Thursday to boost your odds — it's on us, hunni.

did_you_know.headline: Celebration's downtown was designed to be fully walkable.
did_you_know.body: From the lakefront to Market Street, almost everything's a stroll away — by design.
